given: Sentry workflow action filtering receives a data condition group action whose workflow was deleted

should_find.finding: filter_recently_fired_workflow_actions assumes every action association has a workflow_id, so a deleted WorkflowDataConditionGroup leaves None that is reused downstream and can crash status updates

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix e91547d56a39183e2e1d16ec8846262a28abd421. filter_recently_fired_workflow_actions assumes every action association has a workflow_id, so a deleted WorkflowDataConditionGroup leaves None that is reused downstream and can crash status updates
